meaning: n.[高尔夫] (击球时削起的)一块草皮,草皮断片
examples: Capital Idea should therefore invest in the Roxy Playhouse, the Slice-o'-Pizza, and the Divot Golf Club, three new businesses in the Irongate district.
When you take a divot, the ground is a mix of sand and earth.
If you're leaving a divot in the mattress when you get up, it's too soft.
The 23% Black Monday drop in 1987 left a divot that was quickly filled in.
The 23% drop on Black Monday in 1987 left a divot that was quickly filled in.
